hero.headline:
Your pet deserves
loving care
while you’re away
hero.subtext: Professional pet sitting in the Eindhoven area — where every visit is a moment of real connection, not just a routine check-in.

why.headline: Pet sitting that goes beyond the basics
why.body: Feeding and cleaning the litter box are just the starting point. Real pet care means noticing behavioural changes, providing mental stimulation, keeping your pet active through play, and making sure they feel safe and loved — every single visit.

card1.title: Behavioural monitoring
card1.desc: Spotting changes in appetite, mood or activity that could signal a health issue before it becomes serious.

card2.title: Active play & stimulation
card2.desc: Interactive games and playtime to keep your pet physically active and mentally engaged.

card3.title: Comfort in their own home
card3.desc: Pets stay in their familiar environment, reducing stress and keeping their routines intact.

card4.title: Updates & peace of mind
card4.desc: Photo or video updates so you can see your furry friend is happy and well cared for.

card5.title: Medication & special care
card5.desc: Administering medication and following specific routines tailored to your pet’s individual needs.

card6.title: Genuine love for animals
card6.desc: Not just a job — a real passion. Your pet will be treated like family from the very first visit.

card0.title: Registered business
card0.desc: Officially registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce (KVK) — so you know you're trusting your pet to a verified, accountable professional.

about.headline:
Hi, I’m Gabi!
Brazilian animal lover
in Eindhoven 🇧🇷🇳🇱
about.p1: I grew up surrounded by animals and have loved them my entire life. I’ve had dogs, and today I share my home with my husband and our son — and two wonderful cats, Amora and Panqueca, who bring joy to every single day.
about.p2: Living in the Eindhoven area, I noticed how stressful it can be to leave your beloved pet behind. That’s what inspired me to turn my lifelong passion for animals into a service that truly makes a difference — for both pets and their owners.
about.p3: Every animal I care for gets the same warmth and attention I give my own — because to me, it’s never just a job. It’s a privilege to be trusted with someone’s furry family member.

cats.headline: Meet Amora & Panqueca
cats.subtext: My two girls at home — the reason I understand cats so deeply, and the daily reminder of why this work matters.
cats.amora_desc: Playful, mischievous and full of personality.
cats.panqueca_desc: Sweet, curious and always ready for a cuddle.

services.headline: What I offer
services.subtext: Tailored care for cats and small dogs in the Eindhoven area, provided in the comfort of your home or on a refreshing walk.

cat.label: For Cats
cat.title: Home Visits
cat.desc: I come to your home so your cat stays in their own safe environment. Each visit is a full, attentive session — not a quick drop-in.

dog.label: For Dogs
dog.title: Dog Walking
dog.desc: Your dog deserves more than a quick potty break. I offer engaging walks that stimulate body and mind, with the same loving attention I give every animal.

gallery.label: Moments of love 🐾
gallery.subtext: A glimpse into the lives of our adorable clients

booking.headline:
Ready to book
a visit for your
furry friend?
booking.body: Getting started is easy! Reach out via WhatsApp or email. We’ll schedule a free meet & greet first so your pet can get comfortable with me before the first official visit.
booking.step1: Get in touch — send a WhatsApp or email with your pet’s details and the dates you need.
booking.step2: Free meet & greet — I’ll visit your home so your pet and I can get acquainted. No commitment needed.
booking.step3: Confirm & relax — once everything is set, you can go worry-free knowing your pet is in loving hands.
booking.step4: Stay updated — photo or video updates during every visit so you’re never left wondering.
booking.step5: Key holding available. Your home and pet’s safety are always my top priority.

fees.headline: Simple & transparent pricing
fees.subtext: One straightforward rate — no surprises. Weekdays, weekends and school holidays are all the same price.

standard.title: Home Visit / Dog Walk
standard.desc: Per visit, within a 5 km radius of Winkelcentrum Woensel, Eindhoven. Same rate on weekdays, weekends and during school holidays.

travel.title: Outside the 5 km zone
travel.desc: If you live outside the 5 km radius from Winkelcentrum Woensel, a small travel surcharge applies per additional kilometre.
travel.item3: Contact me to check your area

holiday.title: Dutch National Holidays
holiday.desc: Visits on official Dutch national holidays carry an additional holiday surcharge on top of the regular rate.

fees.note: Not sure if you’re in the 5 km zone? Just send me a WhatsApp or email with your address and I’ll check right away. The meet & greet is always free, with no obligation.

contact.headline:
Have a question?
Get in touch!
contact.body: If you have any question you would like to make, do not hesitate and contact me!

footer.brand_text: Professional pet sitting in the Eindhoven area. Caring for your cats and dogs with the love they deserve — one visit at a time. 🐾
